title: 4-Week Aqīdah Course (Pt.1 & Pt.2)
about: A two-part study of Jowharat al-Tawhid. Both parts can be taken independently.
subjects: Part 1 — Attributes of the Divine: Jowharat al-Tawhid, a study of the Attributes of Allah. Runs July 2026.
Part 2 — Attributes of the Prophets & the Afterlife: Continuing from Part 1. Runs August 2026.
